command: import pathlib; content=pathlib.Path('pyproject.toml').read_text(encoding='utf-8'); assert 'PLW2901' in content, 'PLW2901 not found in pyproject.toml'; assert 'extend-select' in content, 'extend-select not found'; print('PASS')

import pathlib; content=pathlib.Path('.claude/agents/qa-agent.md').read_text(encoding='utf-8'); assert 'PLW2901' in content, 'PLW2901 not found in qa-agent.md'; assert 'shadowing' in content.lower() or 'loop' in content.lower(), 'No shadowing/loop mention in qa-agent.md'; print('PASS')

given.description: 기존 ignore 목록이 변경되지 않아야 함

command: import pathlib; content=pathlib.Path('pyproject.toml').read_text(encoding='utf-8'); required=['E402','E731','E713','E701','F541','F841']; missing=[r for r in required if r not in content]; assert not missing, f'Missing from ignore list: {missing}'; print('PASS')
